modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: TV in Coyote Village Dorm living room is not functioning.

full_description_text: 
During a live chat session, the user reported that the television in the main living room of Coyote Village Dorm is not working. They also mentioned that their personal dorm room TV will not turn on. This issue seems to affect both TVs in the dorm environment.
short_description: TV in Coyote Village Dorm living room is not functioning.
description: During a live chat session, the user reported that the television in the main living room of Coyote Village Dorm is not working. They also mentioned that their personal dorm room TV will not turn on. This issue seems to affect both TVs in the dorm environment.
